cardText: Whenever this Penguin is flopped, boost its vibe by 7 for the rest of this Cycle.

cardText: This Penguin can only [ACT] if you've played a Red Action this Cycle. [ACT] _F_: Choose a Relic and ice it.

cardText: Enters flopped. [ACT] _F_: Choose an Action. Cancel it, return it to its owner's hand, and return this Penguin to its owner's hand.

cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Character in your huddle. Put vibe counters on this Character equal to that Character's vibe. Return it to its owner's hand.

name: Jaskel, Imaginator
cardText: This Character can only [ACT] if you have 8 or more vibe counters on Characters in your huddle. [ACT] _F_: Choose a Character and put 8 vibe counters on it.

name: Umbra on Dream's Edge
cardText: [ACT] _F_: The next time this Character would be iced this Cycle, it isn't.

name: Freeze Frame
cardText: Choose up to two Green Characters in your huddle and put a vibe counter on each of them. Whenever any number of vibe counters are removed from a Green Character in your huddle, if this card is in your ice, return it to your hand.

name: Pump
cardText: Choose a Character with the lowest vibe in your huddle. Boost its vibe by 6 for the rest of this Cycle.

name: Brofessional Agreement
cardText: You get the Baron.

name: Control the Board
cardText: Draw a card. If you used two Characters each with vibe 8 or greater to pay this card's Pudge cost, return this from ice to your hand at the start of the next Cycle.

name: Side Eye
cardText: Choose a Character. Its controller draws a card. Ice that Character.

name: Twist-A-What!
cardText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose a Character and flop it.

name: But You Didn't Even Win
cardText: Choose any number of Green Characters in your huddle. Return them to their owners' hands. Draw that many cards.

name: The Great Chowdown
cardText: Choose any number of Characters and put 2 vibe counters on each of them.

name: Rampant Vibeflation
cardText: Choose a Character in your huddle. Put vibe counters on it equal to its vibe.

name: Squad Strike
cardText: Choose a Character. If it's Green, put 6 vibe counters on it. Otherwise, ice it.

name: Final Verdict
cardText: This Action costs one less _G_ to play for each Green Character in your huddle with any number of vibe counters on it. Draw two cards.

name: Lil Gamer
cardText: Whenever this Character is outfitted, put 2 vibe counters on it.

name: Hoodie Penguin
cardText: Whenever this Character wins Vibe Check, look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Fit card, you may reveal it and draw it. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

name: Junkyard Penguin
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Fit you control and ice it. Draw a card.

name: Penguin in Blue
cardText: Whenever a Fit you control is iced from play, put it on top of your deck.

name: Alchemist Penguin
cardText: When this Character enters the huddle, you may ice a card from your hand. If you do, search your deck for a Fit card and reveal it. Put it into your hand and shuffle your deck.

name: Archaeologist Penguin
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Reveal a face-down Rod you control. If it's a Fit card, put it into your hand.

name: Pengu
cardText: Playable during Action Time as if it were an Action.

name: Lil Cool Guy
cardText: When this Character enters the huddle, choose a Character. You may reveal a Fit card in your hand with Fish cost 3 or less. If you do, put it into play outfitting that Character.

name: Gaming Penguin
cardText: Whenever a Character in your huddle is outfitted, put a vibe counter on that Character.

name: Merchant Penguin
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Fit and choose a Character not wearing it. Outfit that Character.

name: The Great Pengsby
cardText: Whenever this Character is outfitted, if it isn't wearing any other Fits, choose a Character and flop it.

name: The Pengorcist
cardText: This Character can only [ACT] if it's wearing three or more Fits. [ACT] _F_: Choose a Character and turn it face-down as a Rod.

name: Locked-In Penguin
cardText: When this Character enters the huddle, you may ice a Fit you control. If you do, put 4 vibe counters on this Character.

name: Pizza Penguin
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Fit you control and return it to its owner's hand.

name: Lil Messy
cardText: As an additional cost to play this Character, return a Fit you control to its owner's hand.

name: Penguin Who Explores the Jungle
cardText: Whenever a Character in your opponent's huddle is iced, if it's wearing a Fit you own, return that Fit to your hand.

name: Lavish Penguin
cardText: When this Character enters the huddle, outfit it with all the Fits you control.

name: Showtime Penguin
cardText: When this Character enters the huddle, choose a Fit card in your ice and return it to your hand.

name: Detective Penguin
cardText: Whenever this Character is outfitted, draw a card.

name: This Is Not a Pudgy
cardText: This Character costs one less _T_ to play for each Fit you control.

name: Nimbus the Quick
cardText: If an Action or a non-Silly Character's ability would cause you to draw any number of cards, draw a card.

name: Lunaris the Infinite
cardText: You can play one Fit from your ice each Cycle.

name: Finders Keepers
cardText: Choose a Fit and choose a Character not wearing it. Outfit that Character. Draw a card.

name: Turn It Up
cardText: Choose a Fit you don't control. Return it to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

name: Bullish Sentiment
cardText: Choose a Character. Reveal a face-down Rod you control. If it's a Fit card with Fish cost 5 or less, put it into play outfitting the chosen Character.

name: Now a Rod Evermore!
cardText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose a Character. If it has vibe 2 or less, turn it face-down as a Rod. Otherwise, reduce its vibe by 2 for the rest of this Cycle.

name: Time Warp Toss
cardText: As an additional cost to play this Action, ice a Fit you control. Choose a Character and ice it.

name: Downhill Disaster
cardText: Pick any number of Fit cards in your ice. Put them on top of your deck in any order.

name: FOMO
cardText: Reveal the top five cards of your deck. Put all the Fit cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Sunday Afternoon
cardText: Choose a Character. If its vibe is less than its Fish cost, ice it.

name: Fisherman Birb
cardText: Whenever any number of Characters in your huddle are iced, put a vibe counter on this Character.

name: Lil Stuck
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Character in your huddle and choose another Character. Ice the first and put a vibe counter on the second.

name: Lil Balanced
cardText: When this Character is iced, each player draws a card.

name: Lil Forgotten
cardText: When this Character is iced, each player puts the top card of their deck face-down as a Rod.

name: Penguin Who Loves Goodbyes
cardText: When this Character is iced, if it didn't have any vibe counters on it, put it into your huddle with a vibe counter on it.

name: Vesper Who Is the Night
cardText: Whenever any number of Characters in your huddle are iced, put a vibe counter on this Character. At the start of Action Time, choose a Character. Boost its vibe by this Character's vibe for the rest of this Cycle.

name: Cinematic Birb
cardText: Characters in your huddle gain the ability "When this Character is iced, if it has exactly 1 vibe counter on it, draw a card".

name: Pointing Birb
cardText: When this Character is iced, pick an Action card in your ice and return it to your hand.

name: Prized Birb
cardText: When this Character is iced, the player that iced it draws a card.

name: Protector Penguin
cardText: Playable from ice by icing a Character in your huddle in addition to paying this card's Fish cost.

name: Buffering Birb
cardText: Whenever you lose Vibe Check, put a vibe counter on this Character. This ability is the only way vibe counters can be put on this Character. At the start of your turn, if this Character has 9 vibe counters on it, you win the game.

name: Birb Who Finds the Way
cardText: At the start of Action Time, you may choose another Character in your huddle. If you do, boost this Character's vibe by that Character's vibe for the rest of this Cycle, then ice that Character.

name: Poised Penguin
cardText: Whenever any number of Characters in your huddle are iced, choose a Character and put a vibe counter on it.

name: Iron Penguin
cardText: When this Character is iced, choose a player. That player ices a Character in their huddle.

name: Patient Birb
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Character in your huddle and ice it. You get two Fishsicles.

name: Luckmaking Birb
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Character in your huddle and ice it. Pick a Character card in your ice with the same Fish cost as, but different name than, the iced Character. Put it into your huddle.

name: Fisherman Penguin
cardText: Whenever any number of Characters in your huddle are iced, boost this Character's vibe by 2 for the rest of this Cycle.

name: Myra of the Mist
cardText: When this Character enters the huddle, each player returns all Characters with vibe 2 or less from their ice to their huddle.

name: Get Rekt
cardText: Each player ices a Rod they control and draws a card. Each player may pick a card in their hand and put it face-down as a Rod.

name: Head on Out
cardText: As an additional cost to play this Action, ice any number of Characters in your huddle. If you iced two or more Characters this way, draw two cards.

name: Afternoon Breeze
cardText: You can only play this Action if a Character was iced from your huddle this Cycle. Choose a Character and ice it.

name: Double the Luck
cardText: Whenever any number of Characters are iced this Cycle, their controller gets that many Fishsicles.

name: Double Trouble
cardText: Pick a Character card in your ice with Fish cost 2 or less. At the start of the next Cycle, return it from ice to its owner's huddle.

name: Give 'Em!
cardText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose a Character with vibe 2 or less. The next time it would be iced this Cycle, it isn't.

name: Next Floor Please
cardText: The next time a Character would be put into ice from play this Cycle, return it from ice to its owner’s huddle. If multiple are put into ice at the same time, you pick.

name: The Prophecy Unfolds
cardText: Choose a Character. Ice it at the end of this Cycle.

name: Free Fall
cardText: This Action costs one less _P_ to play for each Purple Character iced this Cycle. Draw two cards.

name: If Only They Knew
cardText: Choose a Character. Ice all Characters with vibe equal to that Character's vibe.

name: Hold on Tight
cardText: Ice all Characters with vibe 2 or less.

name: Set Sail
cardText: Each player gives their huddle to the player on their right.

name: Stonebreaker Wizbirb
cardText: _G_ or _R_.

name: Inferno Wizbirb
cardText: _R_ or _Y_.

name: Frostbitten Wizbirb
cardText: _Y_ or _P_.

name: Stormreaper Wizbirb
cardText: _P_ or _B_.

name: Nightveil Wizbirb
cardText: _B_ or _G_.

name: Breakaway Balloon
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_: Put a vibe counter on this Character".

name: Chewy Pendant
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this can produce _T_.

name: Handmade Slingshot
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_: Choose a Character. Move all vibe counters from this Character onto the chosen Character".

name: Mug Life
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. Whenever a Character is outfitted with this, boost its vibe by 3 for the rest of this Cycle.

name: Mystic Paintbrush
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this can produce _P_.

name: Cozy Mittens
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gets +1 vibe.

name: Arctic Ring
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. Whenever the Character wearing this produces Pudge, they produce another Pudge of that same color.

name: Glimmering Coins
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this loses all abilities and can't gain abilities.

name: Puffy Snowsuit
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_: Choose a flopped Character and outfit it with this Character's Fits".

name: Traveler's Lantern
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit and if it's a Blue Character, draw a card.

name: Champion's Belt
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_: The next time this Character is iced this Cycle, choose a Character and ice it".

name: Cloak of Illusions
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "Whenever an Action is played that chooses this Character, copy that Action. (You make new choices for the copy)".

name: Coastal Surfboard
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_, remove all vibe counters from this Character: Choose a Character and reduce its vibe by the number of vibe counters removed this way for the rest of this Cycle".

name: Enchanted Boots
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gets +3 vibe.

name: Compass to Nowhere
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "At the start of Action Time, if you control more Characters than your opponent, ice a Character in your huddle".

name: Distracting Handheld
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this can't produce Pudge.

name: Hero's Sword
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gets +4 vibe. When that Character leaves the huddle, return this to its owner's hand.

name: Trusty Boxing Gloves
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit, then you may reveal a card named Trusty Boxing Gloves from your Rods and put it into play outfitting the chosen Character. The Character wearing this gets +4 vibe.

name: Book of Wonders
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_: Double the number of vibe counters on this Character".

name: Hero's Shield
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. As long as the Stack is empty, the Character wearing this can't be chosen by anything.

name: Classy Bow Tie
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gets +2 vibe.

name: Whimsical Backpack
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "Whenever you play an Action, flop all Characters in your huddle with vibe 10 or greater".

name: The Comeback Staff
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gains the ability "[ACT] _F_: Choose another Character in your huddle. The next time that Character would be iced this Cycle, turn it face-down as a Rod instead".

name: The Crown of House Vibesalot
cardText: Choose a Character to wear this Fit. The Character wearing this gets +20 vibe.

name: Big Ben
cardText: The player with the greatest total vibe in their huddle wins Vibe Check. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

name: Art Museum
cardText: Whenever any number Characters are iced, their controller gets that many Fishsicles. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

name: Taj Mahal
cardText: Prizes are doubled for the Vibe Check. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

name: The Peng
cardText: Whenever a Character has any number of vibe counters put on it during Action Time, flop it. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

name: Birb Bay
cardText: Whenever a player plays an Action, its controller gets a Fishsicle. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

name: Hammer Rod
cardText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Relic and ice it. Ice this Rod. (This Rod doesn't produce Fish).
